items.name: 1 Month Meal Plan
items.description: Ready to make a change? Select the plan that meets your lifestyle and goals! Our 1 Month Plan provides savings of up to 8% vs ordering ala carte meals!
items.simplified_description: A meal plan for one month with savings compared to ordering individual meals.

items.name: 3 Day Meal Plan
items.description: Need a boost to get back on track? Our 3 Day Meal Plan is perfect to help you start eating Fit and feeling great again!
items.simplified_description: A meal plan for three days to help you get back on track with healthy eating.

items.name: Beef Chorizo Quesadilla, Red Salsa, Sour Cream
items.description: Ground beef marinated with Mexican chillies, herbs, and apple cider vinegar. Cooked and stuffed with peppers and cheese inside 2 Orowheat tortillas.
items.simplified_description: A quesadilla filled with marinated ground beef, peppers, and cheese.

items.name: Buffalo Chicken Sandwich in Carbounaut Bread
items.description: Baked almond crusted Chicken dressed with olive oil mayo, cream cheese, and mixed with vegetables, topped with buffalo sauce.
items.simplified_description: A sandwich with almond-crusted chicken, mayo, cream cheese, and buffalo sauce.

items.name: Chicken Boneless Leg Parmigiana, Cauli Mac and Cheese, Vegetables
items.description: Keto Crusted Chicken boneless leg baked and topped with marinara and mozzarella.
items.simplified_description: Baked chicken leg with marinara sauce and cheese, served with cauliflower mac and cheese.

items.name: Chicken Buddha Bowl
items.description: Grilled chicken breast, homemade dip with garlic, parmesan, olive oil, egg yolk, and seasoning with grilled vegetables and pickled slaw.
items.simplified_description: A bowl with grilled chicken, a creamy dip, grilled vegetables, and pickled slaw.

items.name: Crunchy Salmon Sandwich in Carbonaut Bread
items.description: Wild salmon baked and dressed with olive oil mayo and mixed with vegetables.
items.simplified_description: A sandwich with baked salmon, mayo, and vegetables.

items.name: Deep-Fried Hot Wings, Pickled Cabbage, and Celery Salad
items.description: 1 lb wings deep fried and lightly tossed in hot sauce with ranch on the side.
items.simplified_description: Deep-fried chicken wings tossed in hot sauce, served with ranch dressing.

items.name: Egg Curry, Cauliflower Rice, Keto Naan
items.description: 3 hard boiled eggs with diced rutabaga in onion tomato curry, served with cauli rice and keto naan.
items.simplified_description: A curry made with hard-boiled eggs and rutabaga, served with cauliflower rice and keto naan.

items.name: Egg Salad Sandwich in Carbonaut Bread
items.description: 1.5 Free Run Egg, boiled and dressed with olive oil mayo and mixed with vegetables.
items.simplified_description: A sandwich with boiled eggs, mayo, and vegetables.

items.name: Grilled Chicken Leg with Peri Peri sauce (Nandos style), Broccoli, cheese sauce
items.description: Marinated and brined Chicken Leg (on the bone), fire grilled with homemade peri peri sauce on the side.
items.simplified_description: Grilled chicken leg served with peri peri sauce and broccoli with cheese sauce.

items.name: Jerk Chicken and Mango Chutney Wrap
items.description: Grilled jerk spiced chicken with homemade mango chutney in a keto Orowheat tortilla.
items.simplified_description: A wrap with grilled jerk chicken and mango chutney.

items.name: Thai Chicken Red Curry, coconut cauliflower rice, vegetables
items.description: Thai red curry paste with coconut cream, lemongrass, and vegetables.
items.simplified_description: A Thai red curry with coconut cream and vegetables.

items.name: White Butter Chicken and Naan (white chicken tikka with cashew creamy sauce) Vegetables, Cauli Rice
items.description: Chicken boneless thigh marinated and roasted, finished in chicken broth with cashew gravy.
items.simplified_description: Marinated and roasted chicken thigh served with cashew gravy, vegetables, and cauliflower rice.
